who: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month
offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month, manual compilation causes delays in reporting. We automate expense report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
problem: Inaccurate expense reports lead to client dissatisfaction and potential loss of business.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of credit card transactions and monthly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
